scenarios.title: User navigates to Task List and sees all tasks
scenarios.userAction: User clicks Tasks in the sidebar navigation
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Task list page displays with title 'Tasks', table shows all tasks with Name, Status, Priority, Due Date columns
scenarios.testReference: AP-T167: Page Load - User navigates to Task List and sees all tasks

scenarios.title: User applies status filter and table updates
scenarios.userAction: User selects 'Completed' from the Status filter dropdown
scenarios.expectedOutcome: Table shows only tasks with status 'Completed', other tasks are hidden
scenarios.testReference: AP-T168: Filters - User applies status filter and table updates

scenarios.title: User clears filters and all tasks reappear
scenarios.userAction: User clicks the Clear Filters button
scenarios.expectedOutcome: All filter selections reset to 'All', table shows all tasks again
scenarios.testReference: AP-T169: Filters - User clears filters and all tasks reappear
